tweets.name: Colin Wu
tweets.content:
Token 大火，却不是币圈的 token，怎么理解: 

token 等于: 一段文本被拆分后的最小可处理单位

文字 → token → 数字 → 神经网络计算 → token → 文字

可以把 token 想象成 AI 吃的“文字颗粒”

文字 → 切碎 → token 颗粒 → AI 消化

AI 的计算量、价格、上下文长度，
都和 token 数量相关。

tweets.name: Vic TALK
tweets.content:
openclaw龙虾和龙虾杀手Perplexity有什么不同？一个视频讲清我们应该如何选择这两个ai应用

两个产品在架构上不同，openclaw更加的个人化，定制化，需要自己配置大模型，可以基于个人设备和个人的调试使用为个人ai应用的发展找出最优解，更像是私人助理。缺点是安全性和个人适配难度大，用户体验不好…

tweets.name: Vic TALK
tweets.content:
当下的两种ai意淫：
1️⃣人类总会无限放大的ai的能力：ai能做好10%的事情，人们就觉得ai能做到500%的事情。

2️⃣人类觉得努力就有收获：只要人们每天努力学习和使用ai，就一定能提升工作效率优化工作流，甚至赚到更多钱。
实际上除了烧了更多token之外，大部分的时间都是在做无用功，并且带来了更多的ai焦虑。

tweets.name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
tweets.content:
I gotta passionately vent with you all, in some tomato fueled Italian glory. 🍅💪

I've been watching the price here you guys. It's been holding a solid million dollar mkt cap for a while. That's a solid as hell floor, especially in this market.

I see it man. I see the fuckin dedication. I share the frustration with you guys. Not because I own the coin, but because I see how hard a lot of you are working, and it sucks that Kol's make or break this game.

All the stuff thats happened the last several weeks would have been shit they lapped up.

 I think they see authenticity, and they're scared of it like oil to water. Because they're so used to shilling shit that doesn't matter, the moment someone comes in with something genuine they don't know how to handle it.

Here's the deal though.
Don't buy this coin if you want a 'founder attitude' with a pitch deck. 

To the people who keep circling in and out for the last month on this floor- thanks for the fees I guess. 

But this community ain't gonna budge. They've proved it. If you buy this coin you might as well set it and forget it.

We've got so much more cool shit cooking here, it honestly makes my head spin. 
Revenue buybacks, automated research, self designing infrastructure. It's slowly but surely coming together.

Buy this coin If you want wild, mad inventor energy, bringing something new and novel to the table. All of this is new. Of course I'm going to say some stupid shit from time to time. That's what happens when you try new things. You throw it against the wall and you see what sticks. 

In fact if you're holding this coin always feel free to DM me - let's build some ideas together.

Speaking of which- I discussed the auction with some people and I think we're going to hold off right now. Only because the market is not great. I think the potential for having an auction and it not going well, would backfire. Good to keep the ammunition for when it's needed/has the biggest impact.

But not to worry, because it's still in the cards. And I've moved Sol out from the tent to a new location where she is still producing fruit 💚🍅

She actually grew way too big for the grow tent, and so I took her out to give more growing room, and stabilized her vines to grow taller. 

At heart I'm a builder! I'm so stoked on the robotic arm that's almost here. I've got the local compute and once that's all setup we begin training and automating this even further! That's what I'm excited as hell about.

Nothing but love and support to the people who have believed in this from day one.

We've been such an oddball, and even though we started the Claude/AI meta together, we've been sort of an underdog.. The goof who made this coin made it the same ticker as solana... The 10% hangup for the hackathon... The Kol rugs...

But not to worry. We are going to create even MORE together.

I'm as optimistic as ever and ready to rock and roll and build 

Tomato onward! 🍅🏴‍☠️

tweets.name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
tweets.content:
这几天，Aave drama 又多了两条，一是由于 wstETH 预言机错误导致2700万美金的错误清算；二是一用户通过 Aave 前端执行抵押品交换功能，因滑点损失5000万美金。

我非常认同图一中 @lukecannon727 的观点：每个项目方都需要为前端添加异常交易熔断保护功能，就像支付软件检测到异常环境会拦截交易那样。事实证明，光靠用户的确认是没用的。

同时，Aave 频繁的 drama 也在将用户推向竞争对手 Spark：除了孙哥将钱转去 Spark 外，一些大户在 wstETH 预言机事故之后，将 wstETH 转去了 Spark。（Spark 预言机会读取发行商底层资产价格，而非市场交易价格，风险更小）。

可能在当下大户眼中，Spark 已经成为了 Aave 的顶级备选方案。

tweets.name: 憨厚的麦总
tweets.content:
说个观点，贵金属这轮的上涨周期结束了，白银已经结束，黄金再延续个半年也结束了

逻辑：有个在任何市场里去观察周期的好方法，就是去找到那个赛道里的龙头和龙二，然后去看他们的汇率对的变化，龙二/龙一的汇率对是周期的量尺

牛初到牛中：龙头涨
牛中：龙二开始补涨…

tweets.name: 憨厚的麦总
tweets.content: 就现在山寨这流动性，项目花个几十万u的韩所上所费，上所公告出来后进来的oi也就几十万u，要想给韩所上所费回点本，真的只能公告出来第一分钟就开割新闻交易的了
